scenario_title: Scaffolding assembly progress on a bridge
scenario_description: Construction: Scaffolding assembly progress on a bridge

turns.text: Here's an aerial view of the bridge scaffolding. Can you describe what you see?
turns.image_description: Aerial view of a partially constructed bridge with scaffolding frames arranged in a disorganized grid, dull steel tones, harsh midday lighting, no workers visible

turns.text: I see a partially constructed scaffolding grid with misaligned frames. The steel components appear unfinished, and there's no sign of workers yet.
I took another photo showing recent progress. Here's a close-up of the scaffolding with some new additions.
turns.image_description: Close-up of scaffolding with two new horizontal beams added, creating partial alignment, workers in hardhats visible in the background

turns.text: I notice two new horizontal beams creating partial alignment. There are now workers present, which suggests active construction happening here.
Here's a wider shot showing more changes. What do you make of this?
turns.image_description: Wide shot showing scaffolding with diagonal braces added, but one section missing, construction equipment parked nearby

turns.text: The scaffolding now has diagonal braces for reinforcement, but there's a noticeable gap in one section. The construction equipment nearby seems unrelated to the structural progress.

What is the final state of the scaffolding assembly?

A) Fully assembled scaffolding with all structural components in place
B) Partially assembled scaffolding with missing sections
C) Scaffolding with temporary equipment still present
D) Disorganized scaffolding with no alignment

ground_truth.reasoning_chain: Turn 1 established the initial disorganized state. Turn 2 showed incremental beam additions. Turn 3 introduced braces but noted a missing section. Turn 4 confirmed completion through cumulative changes in the final image.
ground_truth.key_difficulty: Progressive assembly steps must be tracked across turns to determine completion status

_meta.scenario: Construction: Scaffolding assembly progress on a bridge
